recommendations.title: The Intruders
recommendations.overview: After the traumatic loss of her mother, a teenaged girl tries to uncover the dark secrets behind her new home, in spite of her father's disbelief.

recommendations.title: Stage Fright
recommendations.overview: A struggling actress tries to help a friend prove his innocence when he's accused of murdering the husband of a high-society entertainer.

recommendations.title: Metamorphosis
recommendations.overview: An evil spirit that changes faces infiltrates one family placing one brother in danger while the other tries to save him.

recommendations.title: Scandal Makers
recommendations.overview: Former teen idol Nam Hyeon-soo is now in his thirties and working as a radio DJ. One day a young woman named Jeong-nam shows up and claims to be his own daughter. She also has a son whom she claims to be Hyeon-soo's grandson. Their relation is proven

recommendations.title: Even If This Love Disappears Tonight
recommendations.overview: A high school girl wakes up each day with no memory of yesterday. When she agrees to date a shy classmate, can their love grow with every new beginning?

recommendations.title: Fabricated City
recommendations.overview: In real life, Kwon Yoo is unemployed, but in the virtual game world he is the best leader. Kwon Yoo is then framed for a murder. With the help of hacker Yeo-wool, he tries to uncover the truth behind the murder case.

recommendations.title: Special Delivery
recommendations.overview: A black-market cabbie drives criminals at breakneck speeds until she is left in charge of a fugitive's son.

recommendations.title: Masquerade
recommendations.overview: Though it places his own life in danger, a look-alike commoner secretly takes the place of a poisoned king to save his country from falling into chaos.

recommendations.title: Murder in the First
recommendations.overview: A young, inexperienced public defender is assigned to defend an inmate accused of committing murder while behind bars.

recommendations.title: Children...
recommendations.overview: On March 26, 1991, five boys set off to the mountain to go frog hunting and never come back to their family. While a documentary producer, detective and professor try to solve the mystery of the incident, one of the boys' parents is a suspect.
